subtitle: See · Feel · Experience
title: Our Showroom
description: Experience our curated selection of premium materials in person. Touch, compare, and discover the perfect palette for your project.
book_description: Schedule an appointment with our team for a personalised showroom experience.
material_library_desc: Touch and compare over 500 premium materials — natural stone, ceramics, hardwood, and more.
design_consultation_desc: Book a free session with our in-house experts to plan your renovation or new build.
live_installations_desc: See our materials installed in full-scale room settings to visualise the final result.
sample_service_desc: Take home material samples to test in your own space before committing.
directions_description: Located in the heart of Xàbia with free parking available. Just 90 minutes from Valencia and 75 minutes from Alicante airport.
ready_description: Browse our full catalogue online or visit us in person to experience our materials firsthand.
